title: Everyday Food
description: Unwrap a daily basket full of delicious cooked foods!
body:
![thmbnl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65a2cb9f907e8439b3804298f39b1def2195027.png)
# Everyday Food
*Start each day in Minecraft with a delicious surprise!*

## How it works
You'll receive a **daily food basket** filled with cooked meals, fruits, and vegetables to keep you well-fed.

## Settings
Each player can customize their experience anytime with:  
`/trigger ef.settings`  
> Disable daily delivery, mute notifications, and adjust preferences.

## Uninstalling
Ready to say goodbye ?:
1. Access the Chat Window.
2. Enter the this command and press Enter: 
```
/function ef:uninstall
```
3. You can now remove it safely from the Datapacks folder.

## Additional Notes
- Compatible with other Mods & Datapacks, following the standard conventions.
- This datapack was coded using JMC
